mapper.insert: /* wms-outbound-obsubicexpt-sql-oracle.xml - subicExptTaDtInsert - 부자재반출 - 작업지시 상세 등록 */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_TA_DT ( CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , TAHDKEY /*TASK번호*/ , TADTKEY /*TASK상세번호*/ , WKREGDATE /*작업등록일시*/ , WKSTARTDATE /*작업시작일시*/ , WKCLOSDATE /*작업종료일시*/ , ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , FRLCKEY /*FROM로케이션코드*/ , UOM /*단위*/ , OUTQTY /*반출수량*/ , TAWKDTSTATUSCD /*TASK작업상세상태코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT #{ctkey} AS CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{tahdkey} AS TAHDKEY , COALESCE(MAX(CAST(TADT.TADTKEY AS NUMERIC)), 0) + 1 AS TADTKEY , #{sysdate} AS WKREGDATE , #{sysdate} AS WKSTARTDATE , #{sysdate} AS WKCLOSDATE , #{ickey} AS ICKEY , #{ivatkey} AS IVATKEY , #{lckey} AS FRLCKEY , 'EA' AS UOM , #{outqty} AS OUTQTY , #{tawkdtstatuscd} AS TAWKDTSTATUSCD , #{sysdate} AS INSERTDATE , #{surkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{surkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_TA_DT TADT WHERE TADT.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND TADT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND TADT.TAHDKEY = #{tahdkey}
